meta.goal: Get ripped — lose fat, keep muscle, reveal definition
meta.calcNote: BMR ~1,535 kcal (Mifflin-St Jeor); maintenance ~2,250 kcal. Phase aims (1850/1750/1650) give a ~400–600 kcal deficit. Protein ~160g protects muscle while cutting.
principles: ⚠️ Right-foot friendly: no running, jumping or heavy calf/single-leg loading on the right foot. Train only in pain-free ranges, ice after sessions, and check in with a physio.
Hit your protein target every single day — it protects muscle while you cut.
Stay active daily, but keep it low-impact for your right foot — favour cycling over long walks or running.
Sleep 7–9 hours. Fat loss happens when you recover.
Weigh yourself same time each morning; judge progress on the weekly average, not single days.
One flexible meal a week is fine — stay roughly within calories.
meta.notes: Adapted for posterior tibial tendinitis (right foot): low-impact cardio (cycling/elliptical), no running or jumping, and leg work swapped to bilateral/seated/supported options (leg press, wall sit, glute bridge, seated leg curl) instead of lunges, split squats and calf raises.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.tagline: Build the habit + reawaken the muscles
phases.focus: Full-body strength 3x/week to keep muscle, easy cardio to start the fat burn. Don't go too hard yet — we're building consistency.
phases.cardioNote: Zone 2 = brisk pace where you can still hold a conversation.

schedule.name: Full Body B
homeItems: Pike push-ups / DB shoulder press — 3 x 10

schedule.name: Full Body C
homeItems: Incline push-ups / DB floor press — 3 x 12

schedule.name: Low-Impact Intervals
items: 10 x (30s hard / 60s easy) — bike or seated rower, no running
homeItems: 10 x (30s hard: shadow-boxing + fast arm circles / 60s easy) — no jumping

schedule.name: Rest & Recover
items: Easy 20-min cycle or gentle mobility — keep weight off the right foot

phases.name: Build & Burn
phases.tagline: Upper/Lower split + intervals — turn up the heat
phases.focus: 4 lifting days split upper/lower, plus harder intervals. Calories drop slightly as the cut deepens. Push the weights — keep reps in the tank with 1–2 left.
phases.cardioNote: Add weight or reps each week vs. the last — progressive overload.

schedule.name: Upper Hypertrophy
homeItems: Superset: DB curls + triceps — 3 x 12 each

schedule.name: Lower Hypertrophy
homeItems: DB hip thrust / glute bridge — 4 x 12

schedule.name: Low-Impact HIIT
items: 12 x (30s hard / 60s easy) — bike or seated rower
homeItems: 12 x (30s hard: shadow-boxing + standing band punches / 60s easy) — no jumping

schedule.name: Rest & Recover
items: Easy 25-min cycle or gentle mobility — keep weight off the right foot

phases.adjust: Trim ~100 kcal: skip the evening snack on rest days, or swap a snack for fruit.

phases.name: Shred
phases.tagline: Push/Pull/Legs + extra cardio — bring out the definition
phases.focus: Push/Pull/Legs with an upper pump day and more cardio. Tightest calories of the plan but highest protein. This is where the abs show up — stay disciplined, you're nearly there.
phases.cardioNote: If energy dips, keep the lifts and trim cardio — never trim protein.

schedule.name: Low-Impact HIIT + Core
items: 15 x (30s hard / 45s easy) — bike or seated rower
homeItems: 15 x (30s hard: shadow-boxing + core / 45s easy) — no jumping

schedule.name: Legs
homeItems: DB hip thrust / glute bridge — 3 x 12

schedule.name: Rest & Recover
items: Easy 30-min cycle or gentle mobility — keep weight off the right foot

phases.adjust: Trim ~200 kcal: drop the evening snack daily and keep starchy carbs to training days.

Breakfast.text: Greek yogurt bowl — 200g 0% Greek yogurt + 1 scoop whey + 40g granola + 80g blueberries

Lunch.text: Chicken & rice bowl — 150g chicken breast, 60g (dry) rice, mixed veg, soy + sriracha

Dinner.text: Turkey meatballs (150g 5% mince) + 70g pasta + marinara + parmesan
Dinner.prep: If your turkey mince is frozen, move it to the fridge tonight to defrost.

steps: Mix mince with grated onion, herbs, salt; roll into balls.
Brown the balls in a little oil, set aside.
Soften garlic, add tomatoes + herbs, simmer 10 min.
Return meatballs to sauce 5 min; serve over cooked pasta with parmesan.

Dinner.text: Lean beef chilli con carne (150g 5% mince + kidney beans) + 60g rice
Dinner.prep: Defrost the beef mince overnight if frozen — chilli also tastes better made a day ahead.

steps: Brown mince; add chopped onion, pepper, garlic.
Stir in spices, tomatoes and drained beans.
